MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR ORDER FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND STRIKING CLAIM (OF JAIME CABRERA).

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Granted, no opposition filed. The claim of Jaime Cabrera is striken in its entirety. Plaintiff may withdraw the petition for forfeiture and proceed with non-judicial forfeiture proceedings. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
